data.content:
Kokki Kumar
Kokki Kumar is the protagonist, a secondary school student who becomes a gangster and eventually a politician.  He is driven by revenge for his mother's murder and faces numerous challenges and moral dilemmas throughout his life.<SEP>Kokki Kumar is the protagonist, a secondary school student who becomes a gangster and eventually a politician.  He is driven by revenge for his mother's murder and faces numerous challenges and moral dilemmas throughout his life. He is characterized by his ruthlessness, ambition, and ultimately, a complex internal conflict.

Pudhupettai
Pudhupettai is the slum area where Kokki Kumar lives.

Kumar's Mother
Kumar's mother is murdered by his father, which sets the events of the story in motion.

Kumar's Father
Kumar's father murders his wife and attempts to kill Kumar, leading to Kumar's flight from home and subsequent life of crime.

Mani
Mani is a friend of Kumar who works for Anbu and later becomes an informant against Kumar.

Anbu
Anbu is a gangster who works for Thamizhselvan and initially takes Kumar under his wing.

Thamizhselvan
Thamizhselvan is a leader of the opposition party and a criminal who employs Anbu and later Kumar.

Murthy
Murthy is a politician from the ruling party and a rival of Kumar.

Krishnaveni
Krishnaveni is a prostitute who works for Anbu and becomes involved with Kumar.<SEP>Krishnaveni is a prostitute who works for Anbu and becomes involved with Kumar. She is pregnant with Kumar's child and is later killed by Murthy's men.

Selvi
Selvi is Mani's sister who is forcibly married to Kumar.<SEP>Selvi is Mani's sister, who is forcibly married to Kumar and later reveals her resentment towards him.

North Chennai
North Chennai is the area where Kumar becomes a feared don.

Tamil Nadu
Tamil Nadu is the state in India where the story takes place, and where Kumar later serves as Finance Minister.

India
India is mentioned in the context of Gandhi's birthplace.

Chief Minister
The Chief Minister is responsible for Kumar's release from prison and his appointment as an MLA candidate.

Gang
A group of professional killers led by Anbu, later taken over by Kumar.<SEP>The gang is a criminal organization led by Anbu and later Kumar.

Opposition Party
The opposition party is the political party to which Thamizhselvan belongs.<SEP>The political party to which Thamizhselvan belongs.

Ruling Party
The political party to which Murthy belongs.<SEP>The ruling party is the political party to which Murthy belongs.
